body: Image that shows how hand should be moved to make at least one frame of (hi) waving animation: We need to by default only allow movements of all joins of bones, that are anatomically / biologically possible and not damaging, so it should be possible to make rotations that overstretch skin or make the character look broken. And also controls should show as close to reality degrees in -360-0-360 degrees (make sure to limit them to biologically possible). Double check best guides in the internet on how to do it. Also add optional switch to enable joins control (rotational) directly on the model, that is visualized similar to how it done in best 3D editors with circles and selected rotation on them. Single join control should be visible at a time, but on hover over (deskop) or tap (mobile) we can select different joint to control. Double check we fully support both mobile editing and desktop editing directly on 3D model view, yet as these are experimental they should be turned off by default. So the end result there will be very natural waving animation generated using code, on button click. Also double check that all animations in the application nicely blend together and have smooth transitions. For example now as camera tracking with a head and eyes is turned on by default, when I enable yes and no animations of head, it jumps at start and the end instead of smooth transition. Also I think contributions from both animations should be merged as yes and no animations should be by default in direction of camera, as if the character is communicating with a viewer outside the screen. Anyway where possible double check that animations if possible merged/combined, or even better they all relative, so they can be all combined. Meaning all contributions from all animations that are active at the same time are added/combined/merged. And transitions between animations always smooth, without sudden jumps. We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).
title: We should impove waving (hi) gesture and how bones/arms/legs and so on controlled
